```{r level4-selectivity, fig.width=12, fig.height=10}
    if (nrow(selectivity_wide_ps1) > 3) {  # Need at least 4 samples
      selectivity_matrix_ps1 <- as.matrix(selectivity_wide_ps1[, -(1:4)])
      rownames(selectivity_matrix_ps1) <- selectivity_wide_ps1$SampleID

      selectivity_meta_ps1 <- selectivity_wide_ps1 %>%
        select(SampleID, Region, Waveform, Locality)

      # Distance matrix
      selectivity_dist_ps1 <- vegdist(selectivity_matrix_ps1, method = "euclidean")

      # PERMANOVA: Does waveform predict selectivity?
      cat("\n\nPERMANOVA: Individual Selectivity ~ Waveform + Region\n")
      cat("Sample size: ", nrow(selectivity_meta_ps1), " individuals\n")

      if (n_distinct(selectivity_meta_ps1$Waveform) > 1 &&
          n_distinct(selectivity_meta_ps1$Region) > 0) {

        # Check degrees of freedom
        n_samples <- nrow(selectivity_meta_ps1)
        n_waveforms <- n_distinct(selectivity_meta_ps1$Waveform)
        n_regions <- n_distinct(selectivity_meta_ps1$Region)
        model_df <- (n_waveforms - 1) + (n_regions - 1)
        residual_df <- n_samples - model_df - 1

        cat("Model df:", model_df, ", Residual df:", residual_df, "\n\n")

        if (residual_df > 0) {
          perm_selectivity_ps1 <- adonis2(
            selectivity_dist_ps1 ~ Waveform + Region,
            data = selectivity_meta_ps1,
            permutations = 999,
            by = "margin"
          )
          print(perm_selectivity_ps1)

          cat("\nInterpretation:\n")
          if (!is.na(perm_selectivity_ps1$`Pr(>F)`[1]) &&
              perm_selectivity_ps1$`Pr(>F)`[1] < 0.05) {
            cat("Waveform DOES predict selectivity (p < 0.05)\n")
            cat("→ BP and TP show different prey preferences\n")
          } else {
            cat("Waveform does NOT predict selectivity (p >= 0.05)\n")
            cat("→ BP and TP show similar prey preferences\n")
            cat("   (compositional differences driven by availability, not selection)\n")
          }
        } else {
          cat("No residual component - insufficient samples for this model.\n")
          cat("Try testing Waveform alone:\n\n")

          perm_selectivity_wf_ps1 <- adonis2(
            selectivity_dist_ps1 ~ Waveform,
            data = selectivity_meta_ps1,
            permutations = 999
          )
          print(perm_selectivity_wf_ps1)
        }
      } else {
        cat("Insufficient waveform variation for PERMANOVA.\n")
      }

      # PCoA visualization
      pcoa_sel_ps1 <- cmdscale(selectivity_dist_ps1, eig = TRUE, k = 2)

      pcoa_sel_df_ps1 <- data.frame(
        PCoA1 = pcoa_sel_ps1$points[, 1],
        PCoA2 = pcoa_sel_ps1$points[, 2],
        selectivity_meta_ps1
      )

      p_selectivity_ps1 <- ggplot(pcoa_sel_df_ps1,
                                  aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2,
                                      color = Waveform, shape = Region)) +
        geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 0.7) +
        theme_minimal() +
        scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
        labs(
          title = "PS1: Individual Prey Selectivity Profiles (BP vs. TP)",
          subtitle = "PCoA on Ivlev's E values (each point = one fish)",
          color = "Waveform",
          shape = "Region"
        )

      print(p_selectivity_ps1)
    } else {
      cat("Insufficient samples for PERMANOVA (need at least 4 individuals).\n")
    }

  } else {
    cat("Could not calculate selectivity for PS1 (no matching environmental data)\n")
  }

  # ===== PRIMERSET 2 ANALYSIS =====

  # Get unique samples with locality info for PS2
  samples_ps2 <- ps2_pk_family_counts %>%
    distinct(SampleID, Locality_Name, Waveform_Type, Region)

  for (i in 1:nrow(samples_ps2)) {
    sample_id <- samples_ps2$SampleID[i]
    locality <- samples_ps2$Locality_Name[i]

    # Get site name for environmental data
    site_name <- locality_to_site[locality]
    if (is.na(site_name)) next

    # Get environmental data for this site
    env_site <- env_data %>% filter(Site == site_name)
    if (nrow(env_site) == 0) next

    # Calculate selectivity for this individual
    selectivity <- calc_individual_selectivity(
      sample_id = sample_id,
      diet_data = ps2_pk_family_counts,
      env_data_site = env_site,
      metadata = meta2_sel
    )

    if (!is.null(selectivity)) {
      selectivity_results_ps2[[sample_id]] <- selectivity
    }
  }

  # Combine and analyze PS2 results
  if (length(selectivity_results_ps2) > 0) {
    selectivity_ps2_df <- bind_rows(selectivity_results_ps2)

    cat("\n\n==============================================\n")
    cat("PRIMERSET 2 - Selectivity Analysis (Individual-level):\n")
    cat("  Individuals analyzed:", n_distinct(selectivity_ps2_df$SampleID), "\n")
    cat("  Total family-individual combinations:",
        nrow(selectivity_ps2_df), "\n\n")

    # Summary statistics by Waveform
    cat("Mean Ivlev's E by Waveform:\n")
    selectivity_summary_ps2 <- selectivity_ps2_df %>%
      group_by(Waveform, Region) %>%
      summarise(
        n_individuals = n_distinct(SampleID),
        n_families = n_distinct(Family),
        mean_E = mean(Ivlev_E, na.rm = TRUE),
        mean_abs_E = mean(abs(Ivlev_E), na.rm = TRUE),
        n_preference = sum(Selection_Type == "Preference"),
        n_avoidance = sum(Selection_Type == "Avoidance"),
        .groups = "drop"
      )

    print(selectivity_summary_ps2)

    # Create wide matrix for PERMANOVA
    selectivity_wide_ps2 <- selectivity_ps2_df %>%
      select(SampleID, Region, Waveform, Locality, Family, Ivlev_E) %>%
      group_by(SampleID, Region, Waveform, Locality, Family) %>%
      summarise(Ivlev_E = mean(Ivlev_E, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = Family, values_from = Ivlev_E, values_fill = 0)

    if (nrow(selectivity_wide_ps2) > 3) {
      selectivity_matrix_ps2 <- as.matrix(selectivity_wide_ps2[, -(1:4)])
      rownames(selectivity_matrix_ps2) <- selectivity_wide_ps2$SampleID

      selectivity_meta_ps2 <- selectivity_wide_ps2 %>%
        select(SampleID, Region, Waveform, Locality)

      # Distance matrix
      selectivity_dist_ps2 <- vegdist(selectivity_matrix_ps2, method = "euclidean")

      # PERMANOVA
      cat("\n\nPERMANOVA: Individual Selectivity ~ Waveform + Region\n")
      cat("Sample size: ", nrow(selectivity_meta_ps2), " individuals\n")

      if (n_distinct(selectivity_meta_ps2$Waveform) > 1 &&
          n_distinct(selectivity_meta_ps2$Region) > 0) {

        n_samples <- nrow(selectivity_meta_ps2)
        n_waveforms <- n_distinct(selectivity_meta_ps2$Waveform)
        n_regions <- n_distinct(selectivity_meta_ps2$Region)
        model_df <- (n_waveforms - 1) + (n_regions - 1)
        residual_df <- n_samples - model_df - 1

        cat("Model df:", model_df, ", Residual df:", residual_df, "\n\n")

        if (residual_df > 0) {
          perm_selectivity_ps2 <- adonis2(
            selectivity_dist_ps2 ~ Waveform + Region,
            data = selectivity_meta_ps2,
            permutations = 999,
            by = "margin"
          )
          print(perm_selectivity_ps2)

          cat("\nInterpretation:\n")
          if (!is.na(perm_selectivity_ps2$`Pr(>F)`[1]) &&
              perm_selectivity_ps2$`Pr(>F)`[1] < 0.05) {
            cat("Waveform DOES predict selectivity (p < 0.05)\n")
            cat("→ BP and TP show different prey preferences\n")
          } else {
            cat("Waveform does NOT predict selectivity (p >= 0.05)\n")
            cat("→ BP and TP show similar prey preferences\n")
          }
        } else {
          cat("No residual component - insufficient samples for this model.\n")
          cat("Try testing Waveform alone:\n\n")

          perm_selectivity_wf_ps2 <- adonis2(
            selectivity_dist_ps2 ~ Waveform,
            data = selectivity_meta_ps2,
            permutations = 999
          )
          print(perm_selectivity_wf_ps2)
        }
      } else {
        cat("Insufficient waveform variation for PERMANOVA.\n")
      }

      # PCoA visualization
      pcoa_sel_ps2 <- cmdscale(selectivity_dist_ps2, eig = TRUE, k = 2)

      pcoa_sel_df_ps2 <- data.frame(
        PCoA1 = pcoa_sel_ps2$points[, 1],
        PCoA2 = pcoa_sel_ps2$points[, 2],
        selectivity_meta_ps2
      )

      p_selectivity_ps2 <- ggplot(pcoa_sel_df_ps2,
                                  aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2,
                                      color = Waveform, shape = Region)) +
        geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 0.7) +
        theme_minimal() +
        scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
        labs(
          title = "PS2: Individual Prey Selectivity Profiles (BP vs. TP)",
          subtitle = "PCoA on Ivlev's E values (each point = one fish)",
          color = "Waveform",
          shape = "Region"
        )

      print(p_selectivity_ps2)
    } else {
      cat("Insufficient samples for PERMANOVA (need at least 4 individuals).\n")
    }

  } else {
    cat("Could not calculate selectivity for PS2 (no matching environmental data)\n")
  }

} else {
  cat("Environmental prey availability data not found at:\n")
  cat(env_file, "\n\n")
  cat("Skipping prey selectivity analysis.\n")
  cat("This analysis requires D-frame net collection data.\n")
}
```

## 4.7 Mean Selectivity Comparison

Calculate mean absolute selectivity (|E|) per fish to measure overall "choosiness", then compare BP vs. TP.

```{r level4-mean-selectivity, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
cat("=== LEVEL 4.7: MEAN SELECTIVITY COMPARISON ===\n\n")

if (exists("selectivity_ps1_df") && nrow(selectivity_ps1_df) > 0) {

  # Calculate mean absolute selectivity per individual fish
  mean_selectivity <- selectivity_ps1_df %>%
    group_by(SampleID, Region, Waveform, Locality) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_abs_E = mean(abs(Ivlev_E), na.rm = TRUE),
      n_families = n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  cat("Mean Absolute Selectivity by Individual:\n")
  cat("(Higher |E| = more selective/choosy)\n\n")
  print(head(mean_selectivity, 10))

  cat("\n\nSummary by Waveform:\n")
  print(mean_selectivity %>%
    group_by(Waveform) %>%
    summarise(
      n_fish = n(),
      mean_selectivity = mean(mean_abs_E),
      sd_selectivity = sd(mean_abs_E),
      .groups = "drop"
    ))

  # Test: Do BP and TP differ in overall selectivity?
  if (n_distinct(mean_selectivity$Waveform) > 1) {
    cat("\n\nWilcoxon Test: Mean |E| ~ Waveform\n")
    wt_mean_sel <- wilcox.test(mean_abs_E ~ Waveform, data = mean_selectivity)
    print(wt_mean_sel)

    cat("\n\nInterpretation:\n")
    if (wt_mean_sel$p.value < 0.05) {
      cat("BP and TP differ significantly in overall selectivity (p < 0.05)\n")

      bp_mean <- mean(mean_selectivity$mean_abs_E[mean_selectivity$Waveform == "BP"])
      tp_mean <- mean(mean_selectivity$mean_abs_E[mean_selectivity$Waveform == "TP"])

      if (bp_mean > tp_mean) {
        cat("→ BP fish are MORE selective (choosier) than TP fish\n")
      } else {
        cat("→ TP fish are MORE selective (choosier) than BP fish\n")
      }
    } else {
      cat("No significant difference in overall selectivity (p >= 0.05)\n")
      cat("→ BP and TP are equally selective\n")
    }

    # Visualization
    p_mean_sel <- ggplot(mean_selectivity,
                         aes(x = Waveform, y = mean_abs_E, fill = Waveform)) +
      geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
      geom_jitter(width = 0.1, size = 3, alpha = 0.6) +
      theme_minimal() +
      scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
      labs(
        title = "Mean Absolute Selectivity: BP vs. TP",
        subtitle = "Higher values = more selective (choosier)",
        x = "Waveform",
        y = "Mean |Ivlev's E|"
      ) +
      theme(legend.position = "none")

    print(p_mean_sel)
  }

} else {
  cat("PS1: Selectivity data not available.\n")
}

# ===== PRIMERSET 2 MEAN SELECTIVITY =====

if (exists("selectivity_ps2_df") && nrow(selectivity_ps2_df) > 0) {

  cat("\n\n==============================================\n")
  cat("PRIMERSET 2 - Mean Selectivity\n")
  cat("==============================================\n\n")

  # Calculate mean absolute selectivity per individual fish
  mean_selectivity_ps2 <- selectivity_ps2_df %>%
    group_by(SampleID, Region, Waveform, Locality) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_abs_E = mean(abs(Ivlev_E), na.rm = TRUE),
      n_families = n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  cat("Mean Absolute Selectivity by Individual:\n")
  cat("(Higher |E| = more selective/choosy)\n\n")
  print(head(mean_selectivity_ps2, 10))

  cat("\n\nSummary by Waveform:\n")
  print(mean_selectivity_ps2 %>%
    group_by(Waveform) %>%
    summarise(
      n_fish = n(),
      mean_selectivity = mean(mean_abs_E),
      sd_selectivity = sd(mean_abs_E),
      .groups = "drop"
    ))

  # Test: Do BP and TP differ in overall selectivity?
  if (n_distinct(mean_selectivity_ps2$Waveform) > 1) {
    cat("\n\nWilcoxon Test: Mean |E| ~ Waveform\n")
    wt_mean_sel_ps2 <- wilcox.test(mean_abs_E ~ Waveform,
                                    data = mean_selectivity_ps2)
    print(wt_mean_sel_ps2)

    cat("\n\nInterpretation:\n")
    if (wt_mean_sel_ps2$p.value < 0.05) {
      cat("BP and TP differ significantly in overall selectivity (p < 0.05)\n")

      bp_mean <- mean(mean_selectivity_ps2$mean_abs_E[
        mean_selectivity_ps2$Waveform == "BP"])
      tp_mean <- mean(mean_selectivity_ps2$mean_abs_E[
        mean_selectivity_ps2$Waveform == "TP"])

      if (bp_mean > tp_mean) {
        cat("→ BP fish are MORE selective (choosier) than TP fish\n")
      } else {
        cat("→ TP fish are MORE selective (choosier) than BP fish\n")
      }
    } else {
      cat("No significant difference in overall selectivity (p >= 0.05)\n")
      cat("→ BP and TP are equally selective\n")
    }

    # Visualization
    p_mean_sel_ps2 <- ggplot(mean_selectivity_ps2,
                             aes(x = Waveform, y = mean_abs_E,
                                 fill = Waveform)) +
      geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
      geom_jitter(width = 0.1, size = 3, alpha = 0.6) +
      theme_minimal() +
      scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
      labs(
        title = "PS2: Mean Absolute Selectivity: BP vs. TP",
        subtitle = "Higher values = more selective (choosier)",
        x = "Waveform",
        y = "Mean |Ivlev's E|"
      ) +
      theme(legend.position = "none")

    print(p_mean_sel_ps2)
  }

} else {
  cat("PS2: Selectivity data not available.\n")
}
```

## 4.8 Synthesis and Interpretation

For detailed interpretation guidelines, manuscript writing templates, and analytical strategy framework, see:

**[analysis_plan.md](./analysis_plan.md)**

```{r level4-synthesis-brief}
cat("=== LEVEL 4.8: SYNTHESIS ===\n\n")
cat("See analysis_plan.md for complete interpretation framework.\n\n")
cat("Analysis complete. Results ready for interpretation.\n")
```

---

**END OF DOCUMENT**
